heading: Frequently Asked Questions
subheading: Everything you need to know before booking

faqs.question: How many events do you host per month?
faqs.answer: Each month, we host one free, large social event open to the entire mahjong community and welcome new members, alongside one special Mahjong Invitational Tournament dedicated to celebrating our most active and deserving members. This exclusive tournament recognizes those who have contributed meaningfully to our community and gives them a chance to compete for the title of Player of the Month. In addition to our core community events, we collaborate with a handful of businesses and brands each month to create unique and curated mahjong experiences.

faqs.question: Where do you teach mahjong?
faqs.answer: We teach private lessons and office workshops throughout New York City — including Manhattan, Brooklyn, and Queens. We'll come to you and bring mahjong tiles and mats.

faqs.question: Do I need to know mahjong to book a session?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our students start as complete beginners. We'll teach you the tiles, the flow of the game, how to score with points, and basic strategy so you'll feel confident sitting down at any table.

faqs.question: Do you teach Hong Kong-style or American mahjong?
faqs.answer: We specialize in Hong Kong-style mahjong, which is widely played across Asia and in Chinese diaspora communities. If you've played American mahjong before, we'll happily walk you through the differences.

faqs.question: Can you host a mahjong workshop at our office?
faqs.answer: Yes — office workshops are one of our most popular offerings. We bring tiles, mats, and instructors to your space. Workshops rates are listed above and we accommodate for groups of 8–24. We invoice through Stripe and accept credit cards.

faqs.question: I'm a business owner or manager interested in collaborating. Where do I begin?
faqs.answer: We’d love to connect! The best way to start is by sending us a DM on Instagram. Drop us a message with a quick intro, and we’ll check out your brand and content to make sure there's great synergy for a joint event. As part of the collaboration, we'll promote your brand through our stories, posts, and reels—our event content typically draws around 25k views with high engagement metrics (we're happy to share screenshots), giving us a good potential to go viral together. From there, we can chat about potential dates, logistics, and pricing to see how we can bring an incredible experience to life.

faqs.question: Can I sponsor your free community events?
faqs.answer:
We are always looking to collaborate with brands, venues, and local businesses to create the most memorable experiences for our free community events. Our large monthly social event draws over 300 people, while our exclusive tournament invites 20 of our most active and strongest players. Sponsoring our monthly event is a fantastic way to get your brand, space, or product directly in front of an engaged and local audience.

In addition to the live, in-person activation, we feature our sponsors across our dedicated event promotion on Instagram. Our posts and reels typically pull around 25k view to upwards of 150k views with high engagement metrics and strong viral potential, giving your business massive visibility both online and drawing in massive in-person foot traffic. 

If you’re interested in collaborating as an official event sponsor, send us a DM on Instagram with a quick intro, and we’ll chat about how we can build an incredible experience together!
